description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the zenhaskell/foundation:lts-12.1 Docker image with three stages: lint, build, and test. In the lint stage add a lint job that runs the command hlint . . In the build stage add a build job that runs stack build and uploads the .stack-work directory as an artifact. In the test stage add a test job that runs stack test, with no additional caches, services, or deployment targets.
